headline: Get Paid 8.3% To Let Someone Else Chase FAST Stock Higher
summary: Get paid a guaranteed cash income on your Fastenal shares now, which you keep no matter what, in exchange for agreeing to sell at a profitable price if the stock keeps climbing.
